segment.source: Renders a heading, optional subline, and a horizontal row of badge tiles, each combining a logo image, label, and short description. Use it for: security seals, payment-method logos, money-back guarantees, certification marks with a one-line explanation, membership or association seals near checkout or calls to action. Prefer 'Compliance Badges' for a plain checkmark-seal row, 'Certifications' when the issuing body matters, and 'Logo Grid' for logos without text.
